info.title: Maps Messaging Rest Server
info.description: Maps Messaging Server Rest API, provides simple Rest API to manage and interact with the server

tags.name: Authentication and Authorisation Management
tags.description: Provides endpoints for managing user authentication and authorisation, including login, logout, token management, and role-based access control to ensure secure interactions with the server.

tags.name: Destination Management
tags.description: Facilitates the management of destinations such as topics and queues. Includes operations for creating, updating, deleting, and querying destinations, as well as managing subscriptions.

tags.name: Messaging Interface
tags.description: Offers APIs for sending and receiving messages, enabling communication between clients and the server. Supports various messaging protocols and real-time event handling.

tags.name: Server Health
tags.description: Includes endpoints for monitoring the server's health and operational status, providing simple and detailed responses for status checks and diagnostics.

tags.name: Server Interface Management
tags.description: Manages the server's network interfaces, including configuration, monitoring, and troubleshooting of connections to ensure optimal performance and reliability.

tags.name: Schema Management
tags.description: Provides functionality to configure, manage, and query schemas used by the server, enabling seamless integration with structured data formats and validation mechanisms.

tags.name: Server Management
tags.description: Includes operations for monitoring and managing the server's status, configurations, and performance metrics to ensure smooth and efficient operation.

tags.name: Server Integration Management
tags.description: Manages the server's integrations with other messaging brokers, enabling interoperability and seamless data exchange across distributed systems.

tags.name: Server Integration Status
tags.description: Retrieves the current status of the server to server integration.

tags.name: Connection Management
tags.description: Handles client connections to the server, offering endpoints for monitoring, managing, and troubleshooting active connections and session details.

tags.name: Discovery Management
tags.description: Provides mechanisms for managing the server's discovery agents, allowing automated detection and configuration of network services and resources.

tags.name: Hardware Management
tags.description: Enables the management of hardware devices integrated with the server, including configuration, monitoring, and diagnostics for seamless hardware-software interaction.

tags.name: LoRa Device Management
tags.description: Offers APIs for managing LoRa devices, including adding, updating, retrieving configurations, monitoring device statistics, and managing endpoint connections.

tags.name: Logging Monitor
tags.description: Offers simple API to retrieve server logs or to stream server logs via SSE

tags.name: User Authentication
tags.description: Provides the rest api login, logout and token refresh

tags.name: ML Model Store
tags.description: Endpoints for managing ML models in the system.

get.description: Returns information about the current user authentication session, can be used to see if the user is logged in

200.description: Returns if there have been updates

post.description: Allows a user to log in and obtain an authentication token. This endpoint does not require authentication and overrides global security settings.
Logs out the currently authenticated user by invalidating their session.

Provides information about any changes in the server's configuration update counts.

get.summary: Retrieve a paginated list of destinations/folders at the specified namespace
get.description: Fetch a paginated list of all known destinations. You can filter the list using a selector string, limit the number of returned entries using the 'size' parameter, and sort the results by attributes such as Name, Published Messages, or Stored Messages. Cached results are returned if available to enhance performance. Authentication is required if the server configuration mandates it.

schema.description: Namespace prefix to browse. Leading '/' is significant. Server normalizes duplicate and trailing slashes. Empty means root.
Maximum number of entries returned in this page.

200.description: Get page of destinations was successful

403.description: User is not authorised to access the resource

get.summary: Retrieve a list of all destinations with optional filtering and sorting
get.description: Fetch a paginated list of all known destinations. You can filter the list using a selector string, limit the number of returned entries using the 'size' parameter, and sort the results by attributes such as Name, Published Messages, or Stored Messages. Cached results are returned if available to enhance performance. Authentication is required if the server configuration mandates it.

parameters.name: filter
parameters.description: An optional filter string for selecting specific destinations. The filter should be a valid expression that complies with the selector syntax.

parameters.name: size
parameters.description: The maximum number of destinations to return in the response. A default value is used if this parameter is not provided.

parameters.name: sortBy
parameters.description: The attribute by which the list of destinations should be sorted before returning. Possible values include Name, Published, Delivered, Stored, Pending, Delayed, and Expired.

403.description: User is not authorised to access the resource

get.description: Fetch detailed information for a specific destination identified by its name. Authentication is required if the server configuration mandates it. Cached results are returned if available to enhance performance.

parameters.name: destinationName
parameters.description: The name of the destination for which details are requested

get.description: Delivers messages via Server Side Events, supports MQTT wild card plus JMS style filtering

schema.title: Destination Name
schema.description: The name of the destination (e.g., topic or queue) to which the subscription is bound.Supports MQTT style wild card subscription

schema.title: Named Subscription
schema.description: An optional name for a named subscription, allowing clients to re-use existing subscriptions if provided.

schema.title: Filter Expression
schema.description: An optional filter expression written in JMS selector syntax to filter messages received by the subscription.

schema.title: Maximum Queue Depth
schema.description: The maximum number of messages that can be queued for the subscription before new messages are dropped.

schema.title: Retain Message
schema.description: Indicates if messages should be retained on the destination for this subscription, meaning they will be stored and made available to future subscribers.

schemaLoadingVersion.description: Configuration schema version. 0 = legacy format, 1 = current format.

sessionId.description: Session ID for the authentication session

AuthConfigDTO.description: Represents authentication configuration settings for REST communication.

schemaLoadingVersion.description: Configuration schema version. 0 = legacy format, 1 = current format.

type.description: Discriminator for the concrete configuration manager DTO.

minimumLowercase.description: Minimum number of lowercase letters required.

minimumUppercase.description: Minimum number of uppercase letters required.

minimumSpecial.description: Minimum number of special characters required.

allowedSpecialCharacters.description: Allowed special characters set. If empty/null, any non-alphanumeric character may be treated as special (implementation-defined).

rejectWhitespace.description: If true, whitespace characters are rejected in passwords.

rejectContainsUsername.description: If true, passwords containing the username (case-insensitive) are rejected.

maximumConsecutiveIdenticalCharacters.description: Maximum number of identical consecutive characters allowed (e.g., 'aaa'). Use 0 to disable.

passwordRegex.description: If set, overrides composition rules. Java regex pattern the password must match. Leave null to use the composition settings.

passwordHistoryCount.description: Number of previous passwords that cannot be reused. Use 0 to disable.

passwordMaxAgeDays.description: Maximum password age in days before forcing a reset. Use 0 to disable.

maxFailuresBeforeLock.description: Number of consecutive authentication failures required before an account is locked.

initialLockSeconds.description: Initial lock duration in seconds once the failure threshold is exceeded. Subsequent locks may increase up to the configured maximum.

maxLockSeconds.description: Maximum lock duration in seconds. Lock times will not grow beyond this value regardless of repeated failures.

failureDecaySeconds.description: Time in seconds after which recorded authentication failures decay if no new failures occur.

enableSoftDelay.description: Enable progressive response delays before lockout is triggered.

softDelayMillisPerFailure.description: Additional delay in milliseconds applied per authentication failure when soft delay is enabled.

maxSoftDelayMillis.description: Maximum cumulative soft delay in milliseconds that can be applied before authentication processing.

allowedProxyHosts.description: Comma-separated list of allowed proxy source addresses. Supports hostnames, IPv4/IPv6 addresses, and CIDR blocks (e.g., 192.168.0.0/24, ::1, example.com).

alias.description: Alias used in the key store. If not set, the first suitable key entry may be used.

type.description: Type of the key store

providerName.description: Security provider name used for KeyStore/SSL operations (optional). Examples: SunJSSE, SUN, SunRsaSign, BC (BouncyCastle).

managerFactory.description: KeyManagerFactory algorithm (optional). Common values: SunX509, NewSunX509, PKIX.

path.description: Path to the key store file. Not required for PKCS11 (which is typically configured via provider settings).

passphrase.description: Passphrase for the key store. Optional depending on key store type and provider.

provider.description: Provider identifier used to load the KeyStore (optional). If both providerName and provider are set, providerName typically takes precedence.

schemaLoadingVersion.description: Configuration schema version. 0 = legacy format, 1 = current format.

type.description: Discriminator for the concrete configuration manager DTO.

clientSecret.description: MAPS license secret retrived from Maps support

schemaLoadingVersion.description: Configuration schema version. 0 = legacy format, 1 = current format.

remoteNamespace.description: Remote namespace (source). Typically a topic/namespace filter. For MQTT-style namespaces, + and # may be used as wildcards.

selector.description: Message selector expression (JMS selector syntax). If not set, all messages match.

includeSchema.description: If true, include schema information when forwarding messages (where supported)

transformer.description: Transformer chain configuration (array of objects). Each entry specifies transformer name and parameters.

additionalProperties.description: Transformer chain configuration (array of objects). Each entry specifies transformer name and parameters.

items.description: Transformer chain configuration (array of objects). Each entry specifies transformer name and parameters.

qualityOfService.description: Requested QoS for the link (0, 1, or 2). For non-MQTT links, 1 or 2 may imply transactional handling.
enum: QualityOfService.AT_MOST_ONCE(level=0, description=Best Effort, no guarantee of delivery, storeOffLine=false, sendPacketId=false, clientAcknowledgement=AUTO)

QualityOfService.AT_LEAST_ONCE(level=1, description=Guarantees at least once but may be duplicated delivery if connection fails between sending and Ack, storeOffLine=true, sendPacketId=true, clientAcknowledgement=INDIVIDUAL)

QualityOfService.EXACTLY_ONCE(level=2, description=Only once delivery, in that the event is delivered to the client once and once only, storeOffLine=true, sendPacketId=true, clientAcknowledgement=INDIVIDUAL)

QualityOfService.MQTT_SN_REGISTERED(level=3, description=Used by MQTT-SN to send publish events to a known topic without the need to have a connection established, this is reserved for MQTT-SN, storeOffLine=true, sendPacketId=false, clientAcknowledgement=AUTO)

schemaLoadingVersion.description: Configuration schema version. 0 = legacy format, 1 = current format.

apiToken.description: API token used to authenticate with the LLM provider

model.description: Model name to use (provider-specific). This is an open vocabulary and must match a model supported by the configured LLM provider.

frequency.description: Operating frequency of the device in MHz

transmissionRate.description: Transmission rate to limit the number of packets/second, 0 - unlimited, else per second

radio.description: Radio type of the LoRa device

frequency.description: Operating frequency of the device in MHz

id.description: Unique ID for the model stream

topicFilter.description: Topic filter to match incoming events

schemaId.description: Schema ID that the event must match

maxTrainEvents.description: Max number of events to train the model

maxTrainTimeSeconds.description: Max time in seconds to train the model, 0 disables

retrainThreshold.description: Outlier rate threshold to trigger retraining (0.0 to 1.0)

schemaLoadingVersion.description: Configuration schema version. 0 = legacy format, 1 = current format.

type.description: Discriminator for the concrete configuration manager DTO.

cacheSize.description: Maximum number of models to cache

cacheExpiryMinutes.description: Model cache expiry time in minutes

eventStreams.description: List of configured model event streams

MapsConfig.description: Maps Server RestAPI configuration for the model store

MapsRepositoryConfigDTO.title: Maps Repository configuration

schemaLoadingVersion.description: Configuration schema version. 0 = legacy format, 1 = current format.

type.description: Repository type discriminator

directoryPath.description: Local directory path for storing cached schemas (used when local mirroring or fallback is enabled).

urlPath.description: URL path of the remote MapsMessaging server used for schema synchronization.

username.description: Username for authenticating to the remote MapsMessaging repository.

password.description: Password for authenticating to the remote MapsMessaging repository.

pushSchemas.description: If true, newly created or updated schemas will be pushed to the remote repository.

pullSchemas.description: If true, schemas will be periodically pulled from the remote repository to keep the local cache up to date.

MapsRepositoryConfigDTO.description: Configuration details for the MapsMessaging-based repository. Used when repositoryType is set to 'Maps'.

MavlinkConfigDTO.description: MAVLink protocol configuration. Controls session handling, topic mapping, JSON conversion, and optional frame forwarding.

fullyQualifiedPathToDialectXml.description: Fully qualified path to the MAVLink dialect XML. If not provided, the common dialect is used.

idleSessionTimeout.description: Idle session timeout in seconds. Session is closed if no MAVLink traffic is received within this period.

maximumSessionExpiry.description: Maximum allowed session lifetime in seconds, regardless of activity.

advertiseInterval.description: Interval in seconds at which MAVLink heartbeat or advertise messages are emitted.

maxInFlightEvents.description: Maximum number of in-flight MAVLink events per session. Limits back-pressure and memory usage.

topicNameTemplate.description: Topic name template used when publishing decoded MAVLink messages. Supported placeholders: {remoteSocket}, {systemId}, {componentId}, {messageName}.

parseToJson.description: Convert incoming MAVLink frames into JSON using the registered MAVLink message definitions. If false, raw binary frames are published.

forwardUrls.description: Comma-separated list of MAVLink-compatible UDP endpoints to forward received frames to. Each entry must be a valid udp://host:port/ URI. Blank disables forwarding.

forwardRawFrames.description: When forwarding is enabled, forward raw MAVLink frames instead of decoded messages.

dropIfTargetEqualsSource.description: Prevent forwarding a MAVLink packet back to its source address and port if that address is present in forwardUrls.

dedupWindowMillis.description: Duplicate suppression window in milliseconds. Packets received with identical content within this window are dropped. Set to 0 to disable duplicate detection.

schemaLoadingVersion.description: Configuration schema version. 0 = legacy format, 1 = current format.

type.description: Discriminator for the concrete configuration manager DTO.

delayedPublishInterval.description: Interval for delayed publish in milliseconds

incrementPriorityMethod.description: On rollback of events, whether to maintain the priority or increment it

sendAnonymousStatusUpdates.description: Send anonymous server usage statistics to Maps Messaging

exitOnConfigError.description: Exit server startup if invalid configuration detected

schemaLoadingVersion.description: Configuration schema version. 0 = legacy format, 1 = current format.

enum: QualityOfService.AT_MOST_ONCE(level=0, description=Best Effort, no guarantee of delivery, storeOffLine=false, sendPacketId=false, clientAcknowledgement=AUTO)

QualityOfService.AT_LEAST_ONCE(level=1, description=Guarantees at least once but may be duplicated delivery if connection fails between sending and Ack, storeOffLine=true, sendPacketId=true, clientAcknowledgement=INDIVIDUAL)

QualityOfService.EXACTLY_ONCE(level=2, description=Only once delivery, in that the event is delivered to the client once and once only, storeOffLine=true, sendPacketId=true, clientAcknowledgement=INDIVIDUAL)

QualityOfService.MQTT_SN_REGISTERED(level=3, description=Used by MQTT-SN to send publish events to a known topic without the need to have a connection established, this is reserved for MQTT-SN, storeOffLine=true, sendPacketId=false, clientAcknowledgement=AUTO)

meta.description: Metadata to inject if not present in the message

dataMap.description: Data map to inject if keys are not present in the message

maximumSessionExpiry.description: Maximum session expiry time in seconds

enableKeyValues.description: Enable NATS Key values via jetstream

enableObjectStore.description: Enable NATS object store via jetstream

SaslConfigDTO.title: SASL Configuration DTO

schemaLoadingVersion.description: Configuration schema version. 0 = legacy format, 1 = current format.

realmName.description: The realm name used for SASL authentication

mechanism.description: The SASL mechanism, such as PLAIN or SCRAM-SHA-256

saslEntries.description: Additional SASL entries as key-value pairs

SaslConfigDTO.description: Represents the configuration for SASL authentication used for REST communication.

incomingMessagePollInterval.description: Time in seconds to poll the modem for incoming messages

outgoingMessagePollInterval.description: Time in seconds to poll for outgoing messages

maxBufferSize.description: maximum buffer size allowed by the satellite communications

compressionCutoffSize.description: minimum sized buffer that will be compressed

messageLifeTimeInMinutes.description: life time of message in minutes

sendHighPriorityMessages.description: If set, then high priority messages will NOT be queued, will incur additional charges

sinNumber.description: The SIN number that maps should use, must be greater then 128

httpRequestTimeout.description: HTTP Request time out in seconds

maxInflightEventsPerDevice.description: Max number of events to be in flight per each modems

commonInboundPublishRoot.description: Topic template for publishing decoded common (SIN < 127) inbound messages (after parsing SIN/MIN).

commonOutboundPublishRoot.description: Topic root for accepting outbound common (SIN < 127) messages to be encoded and sent to the modem. Wildcards are allowed.

mapsInboundPublishRoot.description: Topic template for publishing decoded MAPS (SIN 147) inbound messages into a namespace tree (after parsing).

mapsOutboundPublishRoot.description: Topic template for accepting outbound MAPS (SIN 147) messages from a namespace tree to be encoded and sent to the modem.

outboundBroadcast.description: Topic used to broadcast a message to all modems/clients (encoded and sent to each).

deviceInfoUpdateMinutes.description: Device Info update time in minutes

EndPointSummaryDTO.title: End Point Information

adapter.description: Adapter name or type associated with this endpoint

protocolName.description: Name of the protocol used by the endpoint

protocolVersion.description: Version of the protocol used by the endpoint

proxyAddress.description: Proxy address used to connect the endpoint, if any

connectedTimeMs.description: Connection start time in milliseconds since epoch

lastRead.description: Timestamp of the last read operation in milliseconds since epoch

lastWrite.description: Timestamp of the last write operation in milliseconds since epoch

totalBytesRead.description: Total bytes read by the endpoint

totalBytesWritten.description: Total bytes written by the endpoint

bytesRead.description: Bytes read in the current interval

bytesWritten.description: Bytes written in the current interval

overFlow.description: Buffer overflow count in the current interval

underFlow.description: Buffer underflow count in the current interval

ProtocolInformationDTO.title: Protocol Information

type.description: Type of the protocol

timeout.description: Timeout in milliseconds before the protocol session is considered inactive

keepAlive.description: Keep-alive interval in milliseconds for protocol connections

messageTransformationName.description: Name of the message transformation applied to this protocol

additionalProperties.description: Mapping of selectors to protocol-specific expressions

selectorMapping.description: Mapping of selectors to protocol-specific expressions

additionalProperties.description: Mapping of destinations to transformation names

destinationTransformationMapping.description: Mapping of destinations to transformation names

ProtocolInformationDTO.description: Provides detailed information about the protocol and session

RemoteDeviceInfo.description: Information about the remote satellite device

bytesTransmitted.description: Total number of bytes transmitted through the satellite link

bytesReceived.description: Total number of bytes received through the satellite link

packetsSent.description: Total number of packets sent through the satellite link

packetsReceived.description: Total number of packets received through the satellite link

SessionInformationDTO.title: End Point Information
SessionInformationDTO.description: Provides detailed information about the session

SubscriptionInformationDTO.title: End Point Information
SubscriptionInformationDTO.description: Provides detailed information about the individual subscription

fullPath.description: Fully qualified path for this entry.

destinationType.description: Destination type when kind is DESTINATION; null when kind is FOLDER.

childCount.description: For folders: The number of children within, for destinations will always be 0

DestinationEntry.description: A single immediate child under a prefix. Can represent a folder or a destination.

totalEntries.description: Total number of entries available for this prefix (folders + destinations).

totalPages.description: Total pages available for this prefix given the requested pageSize. Zero if totalEntries is 0.

entries.description: Entries returned for this page. May be empty but is never null.

DestinationPageResponse.description: Paged destination entries for a prefix. Entries contain only immediate children (no recursion).

DestinationDTO.title: Destination

name.title: Destination Name
name.description: The unique name of the destination, which acts as an identifier within the messaging system.

type.title: Destination Type
type.description: The type of the destination, indicating whether it is a queue or a topic, for example.

storedMessages.title: Stored Messages
storedMessages.description: The total count of messages currently stored in the destination.

delayedMessages.title: Delayed Messages
delayedMessages.description: The number of messages delayed for delivery, which might occur due to timing or prioritization settings.

pendingMessages.title: Pending Messages
pendingMessages.description: The count of messages pending processing in the destination.

schemaId.title: Schema ID
schemaId.description: The identifier for the schema associated with this destination, which may define the structure or rules for messages.

noInterestMessages.title: No Interest Messages
noInterestMessages.description: The count of messages dropped due to lack of interest by consumers.

publishedMessages.title: Published Messages
publishedMessages.description: Total count of messages published to this destination.

retrievedMessages.title: Retrieved Messages
retrievedMessages.description: The total number of messages retrieved from the destination by consumers.

expiredMessages.title: Expired Messages
expiredMessages.description: The count of messages that expired before being delivered.

deliveredMessages.title: Delivered Messages
deliveredMessages.description: The number of messages successfully delivered to consumers.

readTimeAveNs.title: Average Read Time
readTimeAveNs.description: The average time, in nanoseconds, to read messages from the store.

writeTimeAveNs.title: Average Write Time
writeTimeAveNs.description: The average time, in nanoseconds, to write messages to the store.

deleteTimeAveNs.title: Average Delete Time
deleteTimeAveNs.description: The average time, in nanoseconds, to delete messages from the store.

DestinationDTO.description: Represents a messaging destination, such as a queue or topic, within the system.

serverName.title: Server Name
serverName.description: The unique name of the discovered server.

systemTopicPrefix.title: System Topic Prefix
systemTopicPrefix.description: The name space prefix used for system topics

schemaSupport.title: Schema Support
schemaSupport.description: Indicates whether the server supports schema validation for messages.

schemaPrefix.title: Schema Prefix
schemaPrefix.description: The name space prefix used for schemas

version.title: Server Version
version.description: The version of the server software, typically following semantic versioning.

buildDate.title: Build Date
buildDate.description: The date the server software was built, formatted as YYYY-MM-DD.

services.title: Services
services.description: A map of services provided by the server, where each key is the service name and the value provides service-specific information.

DiscoveredServersDTO.description: Represents information about discovered servers, including configuration details, schema support, and available services.

Services.title: Services
Services.description: A map of services provided by the server, where each key is the service name and the value provides service-specific information.

DeviceInfoDTO.title: Device Information

name.title: Device Name
name.description: The unique name or identifier for the device.

description.title: Device Description
description.description: A brief description of the device’s purpose or functionality.
description.example: Temperature sensor for monitoring room temperature

type.title: Device Type
type.description: The type or category of the device, indicating its general function or use.

state.title: Device State
state.description: Retrieves any state registers, could be sensor data or device state, is dependent on the device.

DeviceInfoDTO.description: Represents detailed information about a device, including its name, type, state, and description.

IntegrationInfoDTO.title: Integration Information

IntegrationStatusDTO.title: Integration Status

interfaceName.title: Interface Name
interfaceName.description: The name of the interface associated with this integration.

bytesSent.title: Bytes Sent
bytesSent.description: The total number of bytes sent by the interface.

bytesReceived.title: Bytes Received
bytesReceived.description: The total number of bytes received by the interface.

messagesSent.title: Messages Sent
messagesSent.description: The total number of messages sent by the interface.

messagesReceived.title: Messages Received
messagesReceived.description: The total number of messages received by the interface.

errors.title: Connection Errors
errors.description: The total count of connection errors encountered.

lastReadTime.title: Last Read Time
lastReadTime.description: The timestamp of the last read operation.

lastWriteTime.title: Last Write Time
lastWriteTime.description: The timestamp of the last write operation.

state.title: Interface State
state.description: The current state of the interface (e.g., active, inactive).

statistics.title: Statistics
statistics.description: A map of moving averages related to interface performance metrics.

IntegrationStatusDTO.description: Represents the status of an integration, including bytes and messages processed, connection state, errors, and performance statistics.

LinkedMovingAverageRecordDTO.title: Linked Moving Average Record

name.title: Metric Name
name.description: The name of the metric being recorded (e.g., 'latency', 'throughput').

unitName.title: Unit Name
unitName.description: The unit of measurement for the metric (e.g., 'ms' for milliseconds).

timeSpan.title: Timespan
timeSpan.description: The timespan over which the moving average is calculated, in milliseconds.

current.title: Current Value
current.description: The current moving average value for the metric.

stats.title: Statistics Map

additionalProperties.title: Statistics Map
additionalProperties.description: A map containing additional statistical values, where each key is a descriptive label and each value is a measurement.

stats.description: A map containing additional statistical values, where each key is a descriptive label and each value is a measurement.

LinkedMovingAverageRecordDTO.description: Represents a record of moving average statistics, tracking metrics over a defined timespan with specific units.

totalMessagesReceived.title: Total Messages Received
totalMessagesReceived.description: Total number of messages received by the interface.

bytesSent.title: Bytes Sent per Second
bytesSent.description: Number of bytes sent per second.

bytesReceived.title: Bytes Received per Second
bytesReceived.description: Number of bytes received per second.

messagesSent.title: Messages Sent per Second
messagesSent.description: Number of messages sent per second.

messagesReceived.title: Messages Received per Second
messagesReceived.description: Number of messages received per second.

statistics.title: Statistics
statistics.description: A map of moving averages for various metrics.

InterfaceStatusDTO.description: Represents detailed statistics about an interface, including bytes and messages sent/received, connection count, and error counts.

LogEntry.title: LogEntry

logNumber.title: logNumber
logNumber.description: Represents the order for the log entry.

level.title: level
level.description: The level of this log entry

LogEntry.description: Represents a log entry from the server.

LoRaDeviceInfoDTO.title: LoRa Device Information

name.title: Device Name
name.description: The name of the LoRa device.

radio.title: Radio Type
radio.description: Type of radio module used by the LoRa device.

bytesSent.title: Bytes Sent
bytesSent.description: Total number of bytes sent by the LoRa device.

bytesReceived.title: Bytes Received
bytesReceived.description: Total number of bytes received by the LoRa device.

packetsSent.title: Packets Sent
packetsSent.description: Total number of packets sent by the LoRa device.

packetsReceived.title: Packets Received
packetsReceived.description: Total number of packets received by the LoRa device.

endPointInfoList.title: Endpoint Information List
endPointInfoList.description: A list of endpoint information for the device, detailing each endpoint’s status and metrics.

LoRaDeviceInfoDTO.description: Provides detailed information about a LoRa device, including sent and received data statistics and endpoint details.

LoRaEndPointInfoDTO.title: LoRa Endpoint Information

nodeId.title: Node ID
nodeId.description: Unique identifier for the LoRa node.

lastRSSI.title: Last RSSI
lastRSSI.description: The most recent Received Signal Strength Indicator (RSSI) value for this endpoint.

incomingQueueSize.title: Incoming Queue Size
incomingQueueSize.description: The size of the incoming message queue for this endpoint.

connectionSize.title: Connection Size
connectionSize.description: The number of active connections for this endpoint.

lastRead.title: Last read operation
lastRead.description: The last time a packet was received

lastWrite.title: Last write operation
lastWrite.description: The last time a packet was sent

LoRaEndPointInfoDTO.description: Provides information about a LoRa endpoint, including node ID, RSSI, and queue size.

LoRaEndPointConnectionInfoDTO.title: LoRa Endpoint Connection Information

rssi.title: RSSI
rssi.description: Received Signal Strength Indicator (RSSI) for the connection.

missedPackets.title: Missed Packets
missedPackets.description: The number of packets that were missed or lost.

receivedPackets.title: Received Packets
receivedPackets.description: The total number of packets successfully received.

remoteNodeId.title: Remote Node ID
remoteNodeId.description: The identifier of the remote node in the connection.

lastPacketId.title: Last Packet ID
lastPacketId.description: The identifier of the last packet received.

lastReadTime.title: Last Read Time
lastReadTime.description: The timestamp of the last read operation from this connection.

lastWriteTime.title: Last Write Time
lastWriteTime.description: The timestamp of the last write operation to this connection.

LoRaEndPointConnectionInfoDTO.description: Represents connection metrics and information for a LoRa endpoint connection, including signal strength and packet details.

MessageDTO.title: Message

payload.title: Payload
payload.description: The main payload content of the message, represented as a byte64 string.

contentType.title: Content Type
contentType.description: The MIME type of the message payload, indicating its format.

correlationData.title: Correlation Data
correlationData.description: Additional data used for correlating messages, provided as a byte array.

expiry.title: Expiry Time
expiry.description: The expiry time for the message in milliseconds. Default is -1, indicating no expiry.

priority.title: Priority
priority.description: The priority level of the message, ranging from 0 (lowest) to 10 (highest). Default is 4 (normal).

qualityOfService.title: Quality of Service
qualityOfService.description: The Quality of Service level for the message: 0 (at most once), 1 (at least once), or 2 (exactly once).

creation.title: Creation Date/Time
creation.description: The time the server received this event

dataMap.title: Message Parameters

additionalProperties.title: Message Parameters
additionalProperties.description: A map containing optional key-value pairs associated with the message.

dataMap.description: A map containing optional key-value pairs associated with the message.

metaData.title: Event Meta Data

additionalProperties.title: Event Meta Data
additionalProperties.description: A map of string, string values that the server has added to the event as it was processed

metaData.description: A map of string, string values that the server has added to the event as it was processed

MessageDTO.description: Represents a messaging entity with configurable quality, priority, and metadata attributes.

ConsumeRequestDTO.title: Consume Request

destination.title: Destination name
destination.description: Optional, if supplied gets any messages outstanding for this destination, else all messages pending delivery

depth.title: Depth
depth.description: The max number of events that should be returned

ConsumeRequestDTO.description: Requests the server to respond with any outstanding messages specified by the destination or all if no destination supplied

PublishRequestDTO.title: Publish Request

destinationName.title: Destination Topic
destinationName.description: The topic to which the message will be published. This should be a valid topic name recognized by the messaging system.

retain.title: Retain Message
retain.description: Indicates if the message should be retained on the destination. If true, the message will be stored and sent to new subscribers on the topic.

PublishRequestDTO.description: Represents a request to publish a message to a specified topic with optional retention.

payload.title: Payload
payload.description: The main payload content of the message, represented as a byte64 string.

contentType.title: Content Type
contentType.description: The MIME type of the message payload, indicating its format.

correlationData.title: Correlation Data
correlationData.description: Additional data used for correlating messages, provided as a byte array.

expiry.title: Expiry Time
expiry.description: The expiry time for the message in milliseconds. Default is -1, indicating no expiry.

priority.title: Priority
priority.description: The priority level of the message, ranging from 0 (lowest) to 10 (highest). Default is 4 (normal).

qualityOfService.title: Quality of Service
qualityOfService.description: The Quality of Service level for the message: 0 (at most once), 1 (at least once), or 2 (exactly once).

creation.title: Creation Date/Time
creation.description: The time the server received this event

dataMap.title: Message Parameters

additionalProperties.title: Message Parameters
additionalProperties.description: A map containing optional key-value pairs associated with the message.

dataMap.description: A map containing optional key-value pairs associated with the message.

metaData.title: Event Meta Data

additionalProperties.title: Event Meta Data
additionalProperties.description: A map of string, string values that the server has added to the event as it was processed

metaData.description: A map of string, string values that the server has added to the event as it was processed

destinationName.title: Destination Name
destinationName.description: The complete path for the destination that the event is part of

AsyncMessageDTO.description: AsyncMessageDTO represents messages delivered via SSE.

SubscriptionRequestDTO.title: Subscription Request

destinationName.title: Destination Name
destinationName.description: The name of the destination (e.g., topic or queue) to which the subscription is bound.Supports MQTT style wild card subscription

namedSubscription.title: Named Subscription
namedSubscription.description: An optional name for a named subscription, allowing clients to re-use existing subscriptions if provided.

filter.title: Filter Expression
filter.description: An optional filter expression written in JMS selector syntax to filter messages received by the subscription.

maxDepth.title: Maximum Queue Depth
maxDepth.description: The maximum number of messages that can be queued for the subscription before new messages are dropped.

transactional.title: Transactional subscription
transactional.description: Flag to indicate the subscription is transactional

retainMessage.title: Retain Message
retainMessage.description: Indicates if messages should be retained on the destination for this subscription, meaning they will be stored and made available to future subscribers.

SubscriptionRequestDTO.description: Represents a request to create a subscription to a specific destination, with optional filtering and message retention.

JsonObject.description: Schema definition as JSON. Either schema or schemaBase64 must be provided.

epoch.description: Epoch value associated with the schema

ancestor.description: Unique ID of the ancestor schema (if versioned/derived)

schemaBase64.description: Schema definition encoded as Base64. Either schema or schemaBase64 must be provided.

createdAt.description: Creation time in ISO-8601 with offset

modifiedAt.description: Last modification time in ISO-8601 with offset

notBefore.description: Schema is not valid before this time (optional)

SchemaConfigDTO.description: Schema configuration as exposed via the REST API

SchemaPostDTO.title: Schema Post Data

schema.title: Schema
schema.description: A JSON-encoded string representing the schema object to be posted.

context.title: Context
context.description: The name or context of the schema, identifying the scope or purpose for which it is used.

SchemaPostDTO.description: Represents the data required to post a new schema, including the JSON-encoded schema object and its context.

ServerInfoDTO.title: Status Message

timeToCreateNano.description: Time taken to create the status message, in nanoseconds

additionalProperties.description: Map of thread states and their counts

threadState.description: Map of thread states and their counts

ServerInfoDTO.description: Provides detailed status information about the server, including memory usage, CPU statistics, and thread states.

ServerStatisticsDTO.title: Server Statistics
ServerStatisticsDTO.description: Contains various metrics and statistics for server performance, including message rates, connection counts, and data throughput.

SubSystemStatusDTO.title: SubSystem Status

comment.title: Comment
comment.description: A comment or additional information about the subsystem's status.

status.title: Status Enum
status.description: Enumeration of possible statuses for a subsystem.

SubSystemStatusDTO.description: Represents the status of a subsystem in the messaging server.
